---
title: Past Guest Pipeline
description: Time-based post-stay pipeline that tracks guest re-engagement through 14-day, 90-day, and COLD stages.

# Past Guest Pipeline — Time-Based Progression

> Covers [§4.2 Mountain-Past Guest Pipeline](../hubspot-pms-sync-spec.md#42-mountain-past-guest-pipeline) of the HubSpot - PMS Integration Spec.

## Overview

Post-stay guest management. Deals are auto-created by HubSpot when a reservation reaches Closed Won in the Reservation, Nurturing, or Rebooking pipelines. The pipeline uses time-based stages to track how long since the guest's last stay and prompt re-engagement.

**Pipeline ID:** `873502777`

## Diagram

  ⚠ UNKNOWN STAGE ID: 1308614031
  Found on live deal (Past Guest | Cameron Boris, deal 57447475544).
  Does not match any documented stage. May be Pending Approval,
  Closed Won, Cancelled, CL-Not Qualified, or CL-Blacklisted.

## Stage Detail

### Time-Based Stages (HubSpot-Driven)

#### Pending Check-In — `1308814498`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = HubSpot (auto on Closed Won in source pipeline)
pms_role         = None (PMS writes last_stay_date on checkout — currently a GAP)
hs_automation    = Waiting for guest checkout; auto-moves to next stage on check-out
```

#### 14-Days Post Check-Out — `1314059670`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = HubSpot (time-based, triggered by last_stay_date)
pms_role         = Write last_stay_date on checked_out (GAP)
hs_automation    = Task for setter to book closer call
                   Auto-moves to 90 Days after 14 days
```

#### 90 Days Post Check-Out — `1314059671`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = HubSpot (time-based)
pms_role         = None
hs_automation    = Auto-advance to COLD after 90 days
```

#### COLD — `1314059672`

```
lifecycle_stage  = ⚠ DISPUTED — see note below
driver           = HubSpot (time-based)
pms_role         = None
hs_automation    = Deal name updated to "COLD"
                   Task for deal owner follow-up
                   Lifecycle stage update (see below)
```

> **Lifecycle discrepancy at COLD stage.** The cheat sheet's Lifecycle Stages table says Mountain Cold Customer is set "when a guest stay has passed and no new stays are booked within 90 days" -- this describes the COLD stage exactly. However, the cheat sheet's Past Guest Pipeline table lists the lifecycle as "Mountain Customer" for the COLD-Customer row. These conflict. Confirm with stakeholders whether COLD triggers `Mountain Cold Customer` (lifecycle table) or remains `Mountain Customer` (pipeline table).

### Re-Engagement Stages (Same Behavior as Reservation Pipeline)

#### Promo Deposit Paid — `1311050791`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = Guest action / PMS
pms_role         = Same as Reservation (deposit_paid status)
hs_automation    = Auto-moves to Booked Call if meeting scheduled
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage:      "1311050791",
                     cash_collected: <updated with deposit>,
                     <all financial fields recomputed>
                   }
```

> **Label discrepancy.** Live HubSpot and the spec label this stage "Deposit Paid". The cheat sheet calls it "PROMO DEPOSIT PAID" and describes specific behavior (deposit via landing page, `rebooking` contact property checked yes). Confirm canonical label.

#### Booked Call — `1308814499`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = HubSpot (meeting detected on sales calendar)
pms_role         = None
hs_automation    = Automatic when call set on sales team calendar
deal_properties  = {
                     last_stay_date: <staff should verify/fill per cheat sheet>
                   }
```

> **`last_stay_date` at Booked Call.** The cheat sheet lists "Last Stay Date" as a deal property at the Booked Call stage in Past Guest. This likely means staff should verify the date is present when re-engaging a past guest. The property should already be populated from checkout if the PMS gap is resolved.

#### No Show — `1310267549`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = Staff (manual move)
pms_role         = None
hs_automation    = Task for setter (Stephanie) to chase
manual_actions   = Staff fills: hubspot_owner_id, deal_source
                   Setter moves back to Booked Call once call rescheduled
                   Setter fills: setter_assigned
```

#### Quote — `1308814500`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = PMS (quoted status)
pms_role         = Same as Reservation
hs_automation    = Task: deal owner follow up (8 hours)
                   Task: cancel quote if expired, move to CL-Nurturing
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage:        "1308814500",
                     checkin_date:     <booking.checkIn>,
                     checkout_date:    <booking.checkOut>,
                     quote_amount:     <booking.quoteAmount>,
                     quote_expiry_date:<booking.quoteExpiresAt>,
                     <all financial fields recomputed>
                   }
```

#### CL-Nurturing — `1308814504`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = PMS (nurturing status) or staff manual
pms_role         = Sets dealstage
hs_automation    = Creates new deal in Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline
manual_actions   = Staff fills: loss_reason (enum), closed_lost_reason (string)
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage: "1308814504"
                   }
```

#### CL-Not Qualified — `⚠ STAGE ID UNKNOWN`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Not Qualified
driver           = PMS (not_qualified status) or staff manual
pms_role         = Sets dealstage
hs_automation    = Lifecycle stage set to Mountain Not Qualified
manual_actions   = Staff fills: not_qualified_reason
```

> **Missing from spec.** The cheat sheet lists CL-Not Qualified as a Past Guest stage but neither the spec's Past Guest stage ID table nor the live `dealstage` enum query returned an ID for this stage in this pipeline. It may share an ID with another pipeline or may not be configured yet.

#### CL-Blacklisted — `⚠ STAGE ID UNKNOWN`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Blacklisted
driver           = Staff manual
pms_role         = None (PMS skips sync on blacklisted)
hs_automation    = Lifecycle stage set to Blacklisted
manual_actions   = Staff fills: do_not_contact (contact property)
```

> **Missing from spec.** Same situation as CL-Not Qualified. The cheat sheet includes this stage; the spec and live data do not surface a Past Guest-specific stage ID.

#### Pending Approval — `⚠ STAGE ID UNKNOWN`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer
driver           = PMS (pending_approval status)
pms_role         = Same as Reservation
hs_automation    = Task: admin reconcile with PMS
manual_actions   = Staff fills: closed_won_reason
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage:                          <UNKNOWN>,
                     confirmation_number:                <booking.confirmationNumber>,
                     gross_revenue:                      <booking.totalAmount>,
                     revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees: <totalAmount - taxes>,
                     cash_collected:                     <sum of payments>,
                     checkin_date:                       <booking.checkIn>,
                     checkout_date:                      <booking.checkOut>,
                     hubspot_owner_id:                   <if set>,
                     deal_source:                        <if set>
                   }
```

#### Closed Won — `⚠ STAGE ID UNKNOWN`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Evangelist
driver           = Admin (manual move after reconciliation)
pms_role         = PMS writes final financial fields
hs_automation    = Recorded in reports/dashboards
                   Creates deal in Upsell Pipeline
                   Creates deal in Rebooking Program Pipeline
                   NOTE: No 265-day anniversary task (only on first-stay Reservation CW)
manual_actions   = Staff fills: stayntouch_reconciled (legacy — becomes pms_reconciled)
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage:   <UNKNOWN>,
                     <all financial fields — final amounts>
                   }
```

#### Cancelled — `⚠ STAGE ID UNKNOWN`

```
lifecycle_stage  = Mountain Customer OR Mountain Evangelist
driver           = PMS (cancelled status) or staff manual
pms_role         = Same as Reservation
hs_automation    = Automatically moves deal to Recover Pipeline
manual_actions   = Staff fills: cancel__reschedule_request (string),
                   cancellationreschedule_reason (enum),
                   refund_noted (bool)
hs_properties    = {
                     dealstage:      <UNKNOWN>,
                     refund_amount:  <sum of refund payments>,
                     cash_collected: <recomputed after refund>,
                     <all financial fields recomputed>
                   }
```

## Stage Summary Table

| Stage | ID | Driver | Lifecycle Stage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Pending Check-In | `1308814498` | HubSpot auto | Mountain Customer |
| 14-Days Post Check-Out | `1314059670` | HubSpot time-based | Mountain Customer |
| 90 Days Post Check-Out | `1314059671` | HubSpot time-based | Mountain Customer |
| COLD | `1314059672` | HubSpot time-based | **Disputed** -- Mountain Cold Customer or Mountain Customer |
| Promo Deposit Paid | `1311050791` | PMS / guest action | Mountain Customer |
| Booked Call | `1308814499` | HubSpot (meeting) | Mountain Customer |
| No Show | `1310267549` | Staff manual | Mountain Customer |
| Quote | `1308814500` | PMS (`quoted`) | Mountain Customer |
| CL-Nurturing | `1308814504` | PMS / staff | Mountain Customer |
| CL-Not Qualified | **UNKNOWN** | PMS / staff | Mountain Not Qualified |
| CL-Blacklisted | **UNKNOWN** | Staff | Blacklisted |
| Pending Approval | **UNKNOWN** | PMS | Mountain Customer |
| Closed Won | **UNKNOWN** | Admin | Mountain Evangelist |
| Cancelled | **UNKNOWN** | PMS / staff | Mountain Customer or Evangelist |

## Critical Gap

`last_stay_date` must be written by the PMS when a booking reaches `checked_out` status. Without this, the time-based progression through 14-day, 90-day, and COLD stages cannot trigger. This property exists on both contacts and deals in HubSpot (type: `date`).

**Spec reference:** Section 2.2, `checked_out`: "`last_stay_date` -- should be set on checkout (currently not synced -- **gap**)".

## PMS Touchpoints

| Touchpoint | When | What PMS Writes |
|---|---|---|
| `last_stay_date` | On `checked_out` | `booking.checkOut` to deal and contact (GAP -- not currently synced) |
| Deposit / re-engagement | On `deposit_paid` | `dealstage`, `cash_collected`, financial fields |
| Quote | On `quoted` | `dealstage`, dates, `quote_amount`, `quote_expiry_date`, financials |
| Pending Approval | On `pending_approval` | `dealstage`, `confirmation_number`, full financial fields |
| Closed Won | On `confirmed` | `dealstage`, final financial fields |
| Cancelled | On `cancelled` | `dealstage`, `refund_amount`, `cash_collected`, financials |

## Open Questions

1. **What is stage ID `1308614031`?** Found on a live deal (Past Guest | Cameron Boris, deal 57447475544). Not in the spec's stage list or `dealstage` enum options. May be Pending Approval, Closed Won, Cancelled, CL-Not Qualified, or CL-Blacklisted for this pipeline.

2. **Does COLD trigger Mountain Cold Customer or remain Mountain Customer?** The cheat sheet lifecycle table says Mountain Cold Customer at 90 days; the Past Guest Pipeline table says Mountain Customer. These conflict.

3. **Should CL-Not Qualified and CL-Blacklisted be active in this pipeline?** The cheat sheet lists them; the spec's stage ID table and live HubSpot query omit them. Need to confirm whether they exist with undiscovered stage IDs.

4. **Is there a direct re-engagement path to Booked Call** bypassing Promo Deposit Paid? The cheat sheet implies meetings can be scheduled directly from time-based stages.

5. **Is "Deposit Paid" the same as "Promo Deposit Paid"?** Live HubSpot labels the stage "Deposit Paid"; the cheat sheet calls it "PROMO DEPOSIT PAID" with specific re-engagement behavior. Confirm whether these are the same stage with different labels or operationally distinct.

6. **Does Past Guest Closed Won trigger a 265-day anniversary task?** The Reservation Pipeline Closed Won does (per cheat sheet). The Past Guest Closed Won row in the cheat sheet does not mention it. Confirm this omission is intentional (anniversary task only on first stay).
